tasks.title: Implement ticket assignment PATCH endpoint
tasks.description: Add full logic to `PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee` that validates payload, updates the ticket in MemoryTicketStore, and returns the updated ticket.
tasks.design_notes: Update the TicketStore interface to include an `assignTicket(id, assignee)` method and have MemoryTicketStore implement it, keeping the contract in shared/contracts.ts.

tasks.title: Add SQLiteTicketStore with assignment support
tasks.description: Create a concrete SQLiteTicketStore that fulfills the TicketStore interface, handling reads, writes, and assignee updates using parameterized queries.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate all DB interactions in a repository class using better-sqlite3 for synchronous queries to simplify testing and error handling.

tasks.title: Wire SQLite persistence via env configuration
tasks.description: Introduce an environment variable to select between MemoryTicketStore and SQLiteTicketStore at server startup and initialize the SQLite DB with migration scripts.
tasks.design_notes: Place migration SQL files under `server/migrations/` and run them on startup if the DB file does not exist.

tasks.title: Enforce admin-only access on audit log endpoints
tasks.description: Update auth middleware to verify JWTs and check an `admin` role, returning 403 for non‑admin users on `/api/audit/*` routes.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage the existing middleware scaffold, injecting a role‑check function and adding type safety to the request user object.

tasks.title: Implement audit log storage and API
tasks.description: Create an `audit_logs` table in SQLite, add a service to record actions (e.g., assignment changes), and expose `GET /api/audit` for admins.
tasks.design_notes: Use a singleton AuditLogService that writes entries via the SQLiteTicketStore to keep persistence concerns isolated.

tasks.title: Build saved views CRUD UI and backend
tasks.description: Add endpoints to create, read, update, delete saved queue views per user and integrate a new panel in the React client to manage them.
tasks.design_notes: Define a `SavedView` contract in shared/contracts.ts and store them in a new `saved_views` SQLite table linked to user IDs.

tasks.title: Write end‑to‑end tests for new write paths
tasks.description: Add Vitest/Supertest suites covering ticket assignment, saved view operations, audit log access control, and SQLite persistence.
tasks.design_notes: Mock JWTs for admin and regular users to verify auth enforcement and use an in‑memory SQLite instance for deterministic tests.

commits.summary: Add .env.example, CI workflow, .gitignore and README files
